component.name: Segment Anything Layers
component.summary: Segment objects in GIMP with Meta's Segment Anything (SAM1/SAM2/SAM2.1)

description.p: GIMP 3 plug-in that segments objects in raster images using Meta's Segment Anything models (SAM1, SAM2 and SAM 2.1), with macOS Apple Silicon (MPS) support and Hugging Face checkpoint loading.

Note: this extension installs the plug-in files only. The plug-in drives an external Python backend (PyTorch + sam2) that must still be set up once — run the bundled installer (install.command / install-linux.sh / install-windows.ps1) or follow the manual setup in the project README.
